# CWE-263 — Password Aging with Long Expiration (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-263-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

type rotationPolicy struct {
	MaxAgeDays int
}

// Vulnerable: policy allows passwords to remain valid for ten years.
func EnforceRotation(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, changed time.Time) {
	policy := rotationPolicy{MaxAgeDays: 3650}
	if time.Since(changed) < time.Duration(policy.MaxAgeDays)*24*time.Hour {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
		return
	}
	http.Error(w, "expired", http.StatusForbidden)
}
